title: UK Defence Industry Invited to Propose New Energetics Factories

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
The UK Government has opened a call for proposals from the defence industry aimed at enhancing munitions and energetics production within the country. This initiative is part of a broader strategy to strengthen the nation's defence capabilities.

The focus on developing new energetics factories aligns with the increasing demand for domestic production of critical defence materials. Such advancements are essential for ensuring the UK's security and responsiveness in a changing geopolitical landscape. Aviation plays a crucial role in this sector, with Scottish airports facilitating logistics and connectivity for the defence operations that date back to the early aviation developments.

sourceReferences.citationText: mod-press-office – New energetics factories for the UK
